message:
Here's one that sounds made up but is backed by real science: dogs prefer to poop facing north or south. 🐶🧭

When researchers tracked 70 dogs across 37 different breeds — through nearly 1,900 poops — they found that on calm days, dogs tend to line their bodies up along the Earth's magnetic north–south axis to do their business, and avoid pointing east–west. The pattern only showed up when the magnetic field was steady, which is why nobody noticed it for so long.

So all that slow, sniffing, "let me find the PERFECT spot" routine before the big moment? Your dog might genuinely be consulting an internal compass you can't even feel. 🧭

Does your dog have an elaborate pre-poop ritual? Tell me about it below! 🐾
